memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct tee_version_info *info)
memberdef.name: tee_get_version_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to get current tee version.

briefdescription.para: Callback API to open session to Trusted Application.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint32_t session_id)
memberdef.name: tee_close_session_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to close session to TA.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, uint32_t session_id, uint32_t cancel_id)
memberdef.name: tee_cancel_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to cancel open session of invoke function to TA.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct tee_invoke_func_arg *arg, unsigned int num_param, struct tee_param *param)

briefdescription.para: Callback API to invoke function to TA.

briefdescription.para: Callback API to register shared memory.

briefdescription.para: Callback API to unregister shared memory.

briefdescription.para: Callback API to receive a request for TEE supplicant.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, unsigned int ret, unsigned int num_params, struct tee_param *param)
memberdef.name: tee_suppl_send_t

briefdescription.para: Callback API to send a request for TEE supplicant.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_version_info *info)
memberdef.name: tee_get_version

briefdescription.para: Get the current TEE version info.

detaileddescription.para: Returns info as tee version info which includes capabilities description

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_open_session_arg *arg, unsigned int num_param, struct tee_param *param, uint32_t *session_id)
memberdef.name: tee_open_session

briefdescription.para: Open session for Trusted Environment.

detaileddescription.para: Opens the new session to the Trusted Environment

parameterdescription.para: Number of the additional params to be passed
List of the params to pass to open_session call
Returns id of the created session

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t session_id)
memberdef.name: tee_close_session

briefdescription.para: Close session for Trusted Environment.

detaileddescription.para: Closes session to the Trusted Environment

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t session_id, uint32_t cancel_id)
memberdef.name: tee_cancel

briefdescription.para: Cancel session or invoke function for Trusted Environment.

detaileddescription.para: Cancels session or invoke function for TA

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_invoke_func_arg *arg, unsigned int num_param, struct tee_param *param)
memberdef.name: tee_invoke_func

briefdescription.para: Invoke function for Trusted Environment Application.

parameterdescription.para: Structure with the invoke function arguments
Number of the additional params to be passed
List of the params to pass to open_session call

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, void *addr, size_t align, size_t size, uint32_t flags, struct tee_shm **shmp)
memberdef.name: tee_add_shm

briefdescription.para: Helper function to allocate and register shared memory.

detaileddescription.para: Allocates and registers shared memory for TEE

parameterdescription.para: Size of the shared memory region

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_shm *shm)
memberdef.name: tee_rm_shm

briefdescription.para: Helper function to remove and unregister shared memory.

detaileddescription.para: Removes and unregisters shared memory for TEE

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, void *addr, size_t size, uint32_t flags, struct tee_shm **shm)
memberdef.name: tee_shm_register

briefdescription.para: Register shared memory for Trusted Environment.

parameterdescription.para: Size of the shared memory region

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_shm *shm)
memberdef.name: tee_shm_unregister

briefdescription.para: Unregister shared memory for Trusted Environment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, size_t size, uint32_t flags, struct tee_shm **shm)
memberdef.name: tee_shm_alloc

briefdescription.para: Allocate shared memory region for Trusted Environment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct tee_shm *shm)
memberdef.name: tee_shm_free

briefdescription.para: Free shared memory region for Trusted Environment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint32_t *func, unsigned int *num_params, struct tee_param *param)
memberdef.name: tee_suppl_recv

briefdescription.para: Receive a request for TEE Supplicant.

parameterdescription.para: Number of parameters to be passed
List of the params for send/receive

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, unsigned int ret, unsigned int num_params, struct tee_param *param)
memberdef.name: tee_suppl_send

briefdescription.para: Send a request for TEE Supplicant function.

parameterdescription.para: Number of parameters to be passed
List of the params for send/receive

briefdescription.para: Function error origins, of type TEEC_ErrorOrigin.

detaileddescription.para: These indicate where in the software stack a particular return value originates from.

TEEC_ORIGIN_API The error originated within the TEE Client API implementation. TEEC_ORIGIN_COMMS The error originated within the underlying communications stack linking the rich OS with the TEE. TEEC_ORIGIN_TEE The error originated within the common TEE code. TEEC_ORIGIN_TRUSTED_APP The error originated within the Trusted Application code.

briefdescription.para: Return values.

detaileddescription.para: TEEC_SUCCESS The operation was successful. TEEC_ERROR_GENERIC Non-specific cause. TEEC_ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED Access privileges are not sufficient. TEEC_ERROR_CANCEL The operation was canceled. TEEC_ERROR_ACCESS_CONFLICT Concurrent accesses caused conflict. TEEC_ERROR_EXCESS_DATA Too much data for the requested operation was passed. TEEC_ERROR_BAD_FORMAT Input data was of invalid format. TEEC_ERROR_BAD_PARAMETERS Input parameters were invalid. TEEC_ERROR_BAD_STATE Operation is not valid in the current state. TEEC_ERROR_ITEM_NOT_FOUND The requested data item is not found. TEEC_ERROR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED The requested operation should exist but is not yet implemented. TEEC_ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED The requested operation is valid but is not supported in this implementation. TEEC_ERROR_NO_DATA Expected data was missing. TEEC_ERROR_OUT_OF_MEMORY System ran out of resources. TEEC_ERROR_BUSY The system is busy working on something else. TEEC_ERROR_COMMUNICATION Communication with a remote party failed. TEEC_ERROR_SECURITY A security fault was detected. TEEC_ERROR_SHORT_BUFFER The supplied buffer is too short for the generated output. TEEC_ERROR_TARGET_DEAD Trusted Application has panicked during the operation. Standard defined error codes.

briefdescription.para: Session login methods, for use in tee_open_session() as parameter connectionMethod.

detaileddescription.para: TEEC_LOGIN_PUBLIC No login data is provided. TEEC_LOGIN_USER Login data about the user running the Client Application process is provided. TEEC_LOGIN_GROUP Login data about the group running the Client Application process is provided. TEEC_LOGIN_APPLICATION Login data about the running Client Application itself is provided. TEEC_LOGIN_USER_APPLICATION Login data about the user and the running Client Application itself is provided. TEEC_LOGIN_GROUP_APPLICATION Login data about the group and the running Client Application itself is provided.

briefdescription.para: Interfaces to work with Trusted Execution Environment (TEE).

detaileddescription.para: The generic interface to work with Trusted Execution Environment (TEE). TEE is Trusted OS, running in the Secure Space, such as TrustZone in ARM cpus. It also can be presented as the separate secure co-processors. It allows system to implement logic, separated from the Normal World.

Using TEE syscalls:
tee_get_version() to get current TEE capabilities
tee_open_session() to open new session to the TA
tee_close_session() to close session to the TA
tee_cancel() to cancel session or invoke function
tee_invoke_func() to invoke function to the TA
tee_shm_register() to register shared memory region
tee_shm_unregister() to unregister shared memory region
tee_shm_alloc() to allocate shared memory region
tee_shm_free() to free shared memory region
